title: neanotis trichoclada
intro: Neanotis trichoclada, also known as the Indian bugleweed, is a flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Neanotis trichoclada include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Neanotis trichoclada typically include teas and infusions made from the dried leaves and flowers of the plant.
